opinion.h: EX PARTE CARRINGTON APPEAL FROM AND ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF CERTIORARI TO THE APPELLATE DIVISION OF THE SUPREME COURT OF NEW YORK, FIRST JUDICIAL DEPARTMENT No. 787, Misc. Decided January 12, 1970
opinion.p: Louis J. Lefkowitz, Attorney General, Samuel A. Hirshowitz, First Assistant Attorney General, and Judith T. Younger, Assistant Attorney General, for the State of New York.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. The petition for a writ of certiorari is denied.
